HV requirements are specified. Install new 1000kVA PM Substation on front property boundary complete with type 2 2500A LVCB, Siemens RTR HV Switchgear, and 80A Fuses. Ring in the new substation into existing HV feeder KC1221 Exeter Road using 240mm2 AL XLPE 22kV cables. ,  LV requirements are specified. Install new LV and HV UGOH on replaced pole 602135. Use TYPE-26 road crossing and TYPE-26 ducts along Western Rd. ,  Earthing requirements are specified. Bond the HV sheath of the HV UGOH cable to OH LV neutral as per EE drawing 348254. Install common earthing system as per EDI100. ,  Substation requirements are specified. Install new 1000kVA PM Substation on front property boundary complete with type 2 2500A LVCB, Siemens RTR HV Switchgear, and 80A Fuses. Remove Pole substation 4384 and associated OH mains.
